text:
Despite the title, this article refers to a chapter draft, not an episode.
-----

Episode Two: The Original Sketches is the second chapter of the Attack on Titan manga as it was originally pitched to the ' editorial department, and approved for serialization. It was written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama.

After the author's choice to begin his story at an earlier point, the contents of this draft were mainly included, with some changes, in chapters 3 and 4.

The 40-pages-long rough draft was published in Japanese inside of Attack on Titan: Beginning, and in English in the second volume of The Best of Attack on Titan: In Color.
